content.text: BASELINE_RED transform-handles cluster — 5 specs failing on origin/main. Investigate and propose fixes.
Reading the failing specs to find the common root cause.
Found 3 of 5 — they all hit the same race in transform-handle-presentation around drag-end. Working through spec 4 (transform-handle-flip) now.
Spec 4 root cause identified — same drag-end race. Moving to spec 5.
